title: Stay Homas. La banda que no hauria d'existir
original_title: Stay Homas. La banda que no hauria d'existir
overview: In the most tragic moment of the pandemic, confined to a terrace in the centre of Barcelona and almost by chance, the musical phenomenon of the Stay Homas was born, a band that now struggles, in their Gen Z way, to escape from an origin that burdens them.
